name: openclaw-security-scanner
description: Security expert for OpenClaw deployments. Scans for vulnerabilities in network config, channel policies, and tool permissions. Provides safe remediation with rollback plans. Fully offline - no external network access required.
author: DTClaw Team

changes: Add primary config path ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json and update /etc path to openclaw.json
Add PortDetectionMode enum with CONFIG_ONLY / PROCESS_CHECK / MULTI_SOURCE modes
Add get_port_from_running_process() to query live gateway port via CLI
Add get_port_from_config() helper with proper fallback to default port
Fix scan_ports: use actual_port (not config_port) in Finding title and description
Fix get_port_from_running_process: cast returned port value to int to prevent type mismatch
Removed external network access (GitHub API fetching)
Scan now operates fully offline on local configuration only
Fixes ClawHub suspicious flag caused by outbound HTTP requests
